settings_title.description: Label for the settings section of the extension

blur_home.description: Option to blur the YouTube home page

remove_badges.description: Option to remove LinkedIn notification badges

time_left.description: Label for remaining focus session time

headings.message: Still here? Set your intention.|Caught you mid-scroll—what's up?|Real work—or rabbit hole?|Focus check: what's this for?|Sneak peek—or serious work?|Before the feed eats you…|Quick check—why this tab?|Scrolling—or here on purpose?|Honest—why open this tab?

prompts.message: What's worth your honest attention on this visit?|Grizzly focus, or a quick paw through this page?|If you finish one thing here, what should it be?|Work brain fully on—or is curiosity driving?|What would make closing this tab feel like a win?|Something you're chasing—or still stirring the pot?|Deadline sprint, deep learning, or a mindful break?|What would productivity mean in the next few minutes?|Proud to log this as work—or honest about wandering?|In your own words: what are you actually doing here?
prompts.description: Prompt asking user for their intention

warning.message: Wow that's a while! I think a more thoughtful reason would help keep our focus! (15+ characters).
warning.description: Warning shown if intention is too short for long durations

duration.message: How long should we watch together for?

close_button.description: Label for close button in Settings Page

settings_locked_during_unfocus_session.message: ⚠️ Settings cannot be configured during an active unfocus session.
settings_locked_during_unfocus_session.description: Alert shown when trying to open settings during an unfocus session

blur_linkedin_home.description: Option to blur the LinkedIn home page
